title: Tetra Nova: Mythic Mobs
description: This mod brings together the mob system to improve (elite, master, lich, overlord) of the Tetra Nova mod
body:
Are you looking for difficulty? Here it is, it will surprise you to come across Mythic Mobs and get killed without regard!!

 

This mod brings together the advanced mob system of the Tetra Nova mod.

 

This mod adds improved versions of basic Minecraft mobs (**elite**, **master**, **lich**, **overlord**).

For each mythic mob there is a tag that is added to the vanilla mobs which allows you to customize the mobs that are eligible for transformation, you can either add mobs or just remove them.

This mod is compatible with other mods.

 

Each percentage of mobs are configurable /gamerule.

You can also configure the loot tables for each mob.

 

_For more questions send comment !_
